prompt: Write an implementation plan for webhook notifications on workshop phase change. This is a new feature — the brainstorm produced a draft WEBHOOK_NOTIFICATIONS_SPEC with success criteria covering configuration (PUT/GET/DELETE endpoints), delivery (async HTTP POST via BackgroundTasks), and edge cases (all 6 phase transitions). New files: server/services/webhook_service.py, modified: server/models.py, server/database.py, server/routers/workshops.py. Needs httpx dependency and an Alembic migration.
assertions: Plan header references WEBHOOK_NOTIFICATIONS_SPEC by name and lists specific success criteria
Plan includes a file map table with new and modified files
Tasks follow TDD pattern: write failing test -> run to verify fail -> implement -> run to verify pass -> commit
Test code blocks include @pytest.mark.spec or @spec and @pytest.mark.req or @req tags
Steps reference exact file paths (not vague descriptions like 'the test file')
Steps include exact verification commands using 'just test-' or 'just spec-coverage'
Final task verifies spec coverage with just spec-coverage and just spec-validate
Plan includes an Implementation Log entry for the spec
Tasks are ordered correctly: migration before models before service before endpoints before tests
